Honey Garlic Chicken

This sticky, savory chicken dinner comes together in under 30 minutes. Serve it over rice with steamed broccoli for a complete weeknight meal.

Ingredients

  • 2 lb boneless skinless chicken breast
  • 1/4 cup honey
  • 4 cloves garlic, minced
  • 2 tbsp soy sauce

Instructions

  1. Pat the chicken dry and season generously with salt and pepper.
  2. Sear in a hot skillet, about 4 minutes per side, until golden brown.
  3. Whisk together honey, garlic, and soy sauce; pour over the chicken.
  4. Simmer until the sauce reduces and turns glossy. Serve over rice.
